tracked uppercase heading

these words should each start with a capital letter

MiXeD CaSe becomes ALL lowercase TEXT

Letter spacing spreads these glyphs apart visibly.

Negative letter spacing tightens this line of text slightly.

Word spacing pushes words apart without changing glyphs.

This paragraph has a 30pt first-line indent. The text wraps to a second line which starts back at the left content edge, showing that only the first line is indented by the property.

A ten percent first-line indent resolved against the containing width, wrapping onto a second line at the normal edge.
